**Drag-and-drop NPC feature added to `/mnt/data/hello-world/grazing.html`:**

- `mousedown` on an NPC sets it as `held`, attaches to the cursor with a -20px Y offset (floats above)
- `mousemove` updates the held NPC's position to follow cursor; drag detection activates at 5px movement threshold
